_comment: Mirrors the service you configure on https://agent.crew.network. Fields follow CROO's service schema (name, description, price, sla_hours/minutes, deliverable_type, requirements_type) plus 1-5 skill tags from the dashboard taxonomy.
name: Hook AI — Job Search Assistant
description: Turns a CV into ATS-ready output, role recommendations, ranked live jobs, and outreach email drafts.

requirements_schema.task: recommend | certs | find_jobs | ats | tailor | draft_email | prepare_application
